zh.Bradford, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉德福德
zh.Howden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭越可爾豪登

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Theodore Wilkinson於1506年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Wilkinson21歲，母親Lady Alice Nicholson21歲。他和Lady Rachel Eccles至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他於1714年住在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯。他去世於1576年6月在英國越可爾吉帕享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Theodore Wilkinson于1506年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Wilkinson21岁，母亲Lady Alice Nicholson21岁。他和Lady Rachel Eccles至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他于1714年住在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯。他去世于1576年6月在英国越可爾吉帕享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Theodore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the French form of the Greek name Theodōros, derived from theos ‘god’ + dōron ‘gift’. The name was popular among early Christians and was borne by several saints.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Theodore Wilkinson was born in 1506, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Wilkinson, was 21 and his mother, Lady Alice Nicholson, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Lady Rachel Eccles. He lived in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England in 1714. He died in June 1576, in Kippax, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Theodore Wilkinson est né en 1506, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Wilkinson, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Nicholson, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Rachel Eccles. Il a vécu à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1714. Il est décédé en juin 1576, à Kippax, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Theodore Wilkinson 1506 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Wilkinson 21 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Nicholson 21. Er hatte mit Lady Rachel Eccles mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1714 hat er in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb im Juni 1576 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Kippax, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theodore Wilkinson è nato il nel 1506 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Wilkinson, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Nicholson, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Lady Rachel Eccles. Vissuto a Great Budworth, Cheshire, England nel 1714. Morì nel giugno 1576, nel Kippax, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Theodore Wilkinsonが1506年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Wilkinsonは21歳，母Lady Alice Nicholsonは21歳であった。彼はLady Rachel Ecclesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1714年にはイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスに住んでいた。彼は1576年6月にイギリスヨークシュアイアキッパックスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Theodore Wilkinson(이)가 1506년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Wilkinson(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Nicholson(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Rachel Eccles(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1714년도에 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 살았다. 그는 1576년 6월 영국 요르크실르 키파스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theodore Wilkinson nasceu em 1506, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Wilkinson, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Nicholson, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Lady Rachel Eccles. Ele viveu em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1714. Ele faleceu em junho de 1576, em Kippax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Theodore Wilkinson родился в 1506 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Wilkinson было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Nicholson, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Lady Rachel Eccles. Он жил в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия в 1714 году. Он умер июнь 1576 г. в местности киппакс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Theodore Wilkinson nació en 1506, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Wilkinson, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Nicholson, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Lady Rachel Eccles. Vivió en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1714. Murió en junio de 1576, en Kippax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
